variants: Sakina Mirpur is an accomplished professional in the field of cybersecurity management, utilizing her skills to tackle the complexities of digital protection. A dedicated member of the Echoing Chisel Carvers, she merges her technical expertise with her commitment to craftsmanship. Her profound understanding of cybersecurity has been shaped through her mentorship under Anisah Bukhari, who guided her through various professional challenges. The Burstone Impact Fund has been instrumental in providing the financial support necessary for her innovative projects. To bolster her qualifications, she also holds a professional license known as Cascade Pilot Documentation, further affirming her credibility in the industry.
